Available recipes:
    update         # Update the system
    toggle-updates # Toggle automatic updates
    changelogs     # Show image changelogs
    check-local-overrides # Diff /etc vs /usr/etc
    device-info    # Gather system info
    logs-last-boot # Show last boot logs
    logs-this-boot # Show current boot logs
    powerwash      # Factory reset (DANGEROUS)
    bluefin-cli    # Configure terminal tools
    enroll-secure-boot-key # Enroll Universal Blue MOK key
